regulatory_events.title: Sixth Circuit AI Sanctions
regulatory_events.summary: US appeals court fines lawyers $30,000 for fake citations and misrepresentations in appellate briefs involving AI-generated content.

regulatory_events.title: EU AI Act Simplification Discussion
regulatory_events.summary: European Parliament committees approved negotiating position on AI Act simplification, aiming to introduce ban on explicit AI deepfakes.

regulatory_events.title: Oklahoma Privacy Bill Passes
regulatory_events.summary: Oklahoma Senate passes comprehensive privacy legislation covering businesses processing data of 100,000+ residents, effective Jan 1, 2027.

regulatory_events.title: Singapore GenAI Legal Rules
regulatory_events.summary: Singapore establishes comprehensive rules for generative AI use in legal practice, setting precedent for AI governance in legal sector.

Rebrands as 'Scale Justice' to reflect evolution beyond pro bono services to broader access-to-justice technology mission

top_stories.headline: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 Mini with parallel subagents capability
top_stories.why_it_matters: Represents a fundamental shift from single-agent workflows to coordinated AI teams, potentially revolutionizing how legal work gets automated at scale.

top_stories.headline: US appeals court fines lawyers $30,000 for AI-generated fake citations
top_stories.why_it_matters: Latest in growing trend of AI-related legal sanctions, highlighting urgent need for proper AI governance and verification protocols in legal practice.

top_stories.headline: Claude Code emerges as leading no-code AI development platform
top_stories.why_it_matters: Democratizing AI development for non-technical users could accelerate legal tech adoption and enable smaller firms to compete with enterprise-level AI capabilities.

one_to_watch.headline: Kim launches enterprise AI execution layer for deterministic outcomes
one_to_watch.why_it_matters: Addresses the critical gap between AI's probabilistic nature and enterprise needs for deterministic workflows, potentially solving a major adoption barrier.
